title: BEM-619 monitoring report
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

files={
 'curator_intake':'governance/curator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'role_orchestrator_package':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'internal_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'analyst_plan':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.json',
 'claude_mailbox':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md',
 'provider_gate_required':'governance/provider_gates/bem605_provider_gate_required.json',
 'provider_gate_recovery':'governance/provider_gates/bem607_provider_gate_and_mailbox_recovery.json',
 'provider_route_decision':'governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json',
 'reserve_audit':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem612_reserve_audit_hourly_report_template.json',
 'executor_item':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem612_execute_hourly_report_canon.json',
 'renderer':'scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py',
 'delivery_recorder':'scripts/record_curator_hourly_delivery.py',
 'hourly_workflow':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
 'static_selftest':'governance/state/bem617_hourly_report_static_selftest_safe.json',
 'live_trigger':'governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger',
 'hourly_runtime_state':'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json',
 'hourly_runtime_report':'governance/reports/curator_hourly_report_runtime.md'
}
status={}
for k,v in files.items():
    p=Path(v)
    status[k]={'path':v,'exists':p.exists(),'size':p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0}

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return None
route=load(files['provider_route_decision']) or {}
selftest=load(files['static_selftest']) or {}
runtime=load(files['hourly_runtime_state']) or {}

live_delivery=runtime.get('telegram_delivery') if isinstance(runtime,dict) else None
live_status='live_sent' if live_delivery=='sent' else ('live_pending_or_not_recorded' if live_delivery is None else 'live_'+str(live_delivery))

checks=[
 {'element':'Curator','status':'PASS' if status['curator_intake']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['curator_intake'],'comment':'Operator task accepted into curator inbox.'},
 {'element':'Registrar/Role Orchestrator','status':'PASS' if status['role_orchestrator_package']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['role_orchestrator_package'],'comment':'Curator package routed to role orchestrator.'},
 {'element':'Analyst GPT','status':'PASS' if status['analyst_plan']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['analyst_plan'],'comment':'Analyst prepared template and questions.'},
 {'element':'Claude auditor mailbox','status':'PASS' if status['claude_mailbox']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['claude_mailbox'],'comment':'Claude review item written to mailbox.'},
 {'element':'Provider gate','status':'PASS' if status['provider_route_decision']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['provider_route_decision'],'comment':'Provider route recorded: selected='+str(route.get('selected_provider'))+' reserve_used='+str(route.get('reserve_used'))},
 {'element':'Reserve audit','status':'PASS' if status['reserve_audit']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['reserve_audit'],'comment':'GPT reserve audit used because Claude runtime was not proven/available in time.'},
 {'element':'Executor item','status':'PASS' if status['executor_item']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['executor_item'],'comment':'Execution item created for renderer implementation.'},
 {'element':'Renderer','status':'PASS' if status['renderer']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['renderer'],'comment':'Canonical hourly report renderer implemented.'},
 {'element':'Workflow','status':'PASS' if status['hourly_workflow']['exists'] else 'FAIL','evidence':files['hourly_workflow'],'comment':'Allowed schedule workflow updated.'},
 {'element':'Selftest','status':'PASS' if isinstance(selftest,dict) and selftest.get('status')=='pass' else 'FAIL','evidence':files['static_selftest'],'comment':'Static selftest status='+str(selftest.get('status') if isinstance(selftest,dict) else None)},
 {'element':'Live Telegram delivery','status':'PASS' if live_delivery=='sent' else 'PENDING' if live_delivery is None else 'WARN','evidence':files['hourly_runtime_state'],'comment':'Delivery status='+str(live_delivery)},
]
all_required=all(x['status']=='PASS' for x in checks if x['element']!='Live Telegram delivery')
blocker=None if all_required else {'code':'HOURLY_PIPELINE_MONITORING_FINDINGS','failed':[x for x in checks if x['status']=='FAIL']}

monitor={'schema_version':'hourly_pipeline_monitoring_report.v1','bem':'BEM-605..619','status':'completed_with_live_delivery_'+live_status,'provider_route':route,'elements':checks,'live_delivery':live_delivery,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:51 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(monitor,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

lines=['# BEM-619 | Full Monitoring Report | Hourly Report Pipeline','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:51 (UTC+3)', '', '## Summary', 'Status: '+monitor['status'], 'Selected provider: '+str(route.get('selected_provider')), 'Reserve used: '+str(route.get('reserve_used')), 'Live Telegram delivery: '+str(live_delivery), '', '## Elements']
for x in checks:
    lines.append('- '+x['element']+': '+x['status']+' | '+x['comment']+' | evidence: '+x['evidence'])
lines += ['', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report=reports/'bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline','cycle_id':'bem619-full-monitoring-report-hourly-pipeline','source':'gpt_monitor','status':monitor['status'],'selected_provider':route.get('selected_provider'),'reserve_used':route.get('reserve_used'),'live_delivery':live_delivery,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:51 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        state={}
state['bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline']={'status':monitor['status'],'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'live_delivery':live_delivery,'blocker':blocker}
state['hourly_report_template_flow']='monitoring_report_completed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:51 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem619_full_monitoring_report_hourly_pipeline.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-619: full monitoring report created. status='+monitor['status']+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created full monitoring report for BEM-605 hourly report pipeline, including provider route and live delivery status')
"""
No issue comments.
